endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/inapp/{productId}/purchases/{token}
endpoints.description: Checks the purchase and consumption status of an inapp item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/purchases/{token}
endpoints.description: Checks whether a user's subscription purchase is valid and returns its expiry time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/purchases/{token}/cancel
endpoints.description: Cancels a user's subscription purchase. The subscription remains valid until its expiration time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.
